mapper.select: SELECT br.*, b.title as book_title, u.real_name as user_name FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC

SELECT br.*, b.title as book_title, u.real_name as user_name FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT br.*, b.title as book_title, u.real_name as user_name FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC

SELECT br.*, b.title as book_title, u.real_name as user_name FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT br.*, b.title as book_title, u.real_name as user_name FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id WHERE br.status IN ('BORROWED', 'OVERDUE') ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC
SELECT br.*, b.title as book_title, u.real_name as user_name FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id WHERE br.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_records (book_id, user_id, borrow_date, expected_return_date, actual_return_date, status) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{userId}, #{borrowDate}, #{expectedReturnDate}, #{actualReturnDate}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT br.*, b.title as book_title, u.real_name as user_name FROM borrow_records br LEFT JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN users u ON br.user_id = u.id WHERE br.status = 'BORROWED' AND br.expected_return_date < CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('BORROWED', 'OVERDUE')
SELECT * FROM borrow_records WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('BORROWED', 'OVERDUE') LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE status IN ('BORROWED', 'OVERDUE')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_records WHERE user_id = #{userId}
